sentences.target: Ich liebe den Ozean im Urlaub.

translations.de: Ich liebe den Ozean im Urlaub.
translations.en: I love the ocean on vacation.
translations.es: Me encanta el mar cuando estoy de vacaciones.
translations.yue: 我喺度假時好鍾意大海。
translations.pt: Eu adoro o mar nas férias.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích biển khi đi nghỉ.
translations.nl: Op vakantie hou ik van de zee.
translations.hi: छुट्टियों में मुझे समुद्र बहुत पसंद है.
translations.id: Saat liburan, saya sangat suka laut.
translations.ja: 休暇中は海が大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; clausal subject of the finite verb.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 1st person singular; main predicate meaning ‘to love’.
Definite article, masculine singular accusative; marks the direct object noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘liebe’.
Preposition, contraction of ‘in dem’; selects dative and heads a locative PP modifying the verb.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of ‘im’, adverbial complement indicating situation/time.

sentences.target: Wir hören den Ozean vom Balkon.

translations.de: Wir hören den Ozean vom Balkon.
translations.en: We hear the ocean from the balcony.
translations.es: Se escucha el mar desde el balcón.
translations.fr: On entend la mer depuis le balcon.
translations.it: Si sente il mare dal balcone.
translations.zh-Hans: 在阳台上能听到海浪声。
translations.yue: 喺露台可以聽到海浪聲。
translations.pt: Dá para ouvir o mar da varanda.
translations.vi: Từ ban công có thể nghe tiếng biển.
translations.nl: Vanaf het balkon hoor je de zee.
translations.hu: A balkonról hallani az óceán hangját.
translations.hi: बालकनी से समुद्र की आवाज़ सुनाई देती है.
translations.el: Από το μπαλκόνι ακούγεται η θάλασσα.
translations.nb: Fra balkongen kan vi høre havet.
translations.ro: De pe balcon se aude marea.
translations.cs: Z balkonu je slyšet šum oceánu.
translations.da: Fra altanen kan man høre havet.
translations.ja: バルコニーから海の音が聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 1st person plural; transitive ‘to hear’.
Definite article, masculine singular accusative; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘hören’.
Preposition, contraction of ‘von dem’; selects dative and introduces a source/location PP.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of ‘vom’, locative/source complement.

sentences.target: Der Ozean riecht heute nach Salz.

translations.de: Der Ozean riecht heute nach Salz.
translations.en: The ocean smells like salt today.
translations.es: Hoy el mar huele a sal.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, la mer sent le sel.
translations.it: Oggi il mare profuma di sale.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天大海闻起来有咸味。
translations.pt: Hoje o mar cheira a sal.
translations.vi: Hôm nay biển có mùi muối.
translations.ar: اليوم تفوح من البحر رائحة الملح.
translations.nl: Vandaag ruikt de zee naar zout.
translations.hu: Ma sós illata van az óceánnak.
translations.hi: आज समुद्र से नमक की गंध आती है.
translations.da: I dag dufter havet af salt.
translations.ja: 今日は海から塩の匂いがする。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular nominative; determines the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; nominative subject of ‘riecht’.
Finite intransitive verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; takes a ‘nach’ + dative PP indicating odor.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause by specifying time.
Preposition selecting dative; here expresses ‘smelling of/like’ something.
Common noun, neuter singular dative; object of ‘nach’, denotes the odor.

sentences.target: Im Radio läuft eine Doku über den Ozean.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈʁaːdi̯o lɔʏ̯ft ˈaɪ̯nə ˈdoːku ˈyːbɐ deːn ˈoːt͡se.aːn/

translations.de: Im Radio läuft eine Doku über den Ozean.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈʁaːdi̯o lɔʏ̯ft ˈaɪ̯nə ˈdoːku ˈyːbɐ deːn ˈoːt͡se.aːn/
translations.en: A documentary about the ocean is on the radio.
translations.es: En la radio ponen un documental sobre el océano.
translations.fr: Il y a un documentaire sur l’océan à la radio.
translations.it: Alla radio c’è un documentario sull’oceano.
translations.ko: 라디오에서 바다에 대한 다큐가 나오고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 电台里正在播一部关于海洋的纪录片。
translations.yue: 電台而家播緊關於海洋嘅紀錄片。
translations.ru: По радио идет документальная программа об океане.
translations.pt: No rádio está passando um documentário sobre o oceano.
translations.he: ברדיו משדרים תוכנית תיעודית על האוקיינוס.
translations.tr: Radyoda okyanusla ilgili bir belgesel var.
translations.vi: Đài phát thanh đang phát một chương trình tài liệu về đại dương.
translations.ar: يُبَث على الراديو وثائقي عن المحيط.
translations.nl: Op de radio is een documentaire over de oceaan.
translations.uk: По радіо йде документальна програма про океан.
translations.hu: A rádióban egy dokumentumműsor megy az óceánról.
translations.hi: रेडियो पर महासागर पर एक वृत्तचित्र चल रहा है.
translations.pl: W radiu leci dokument o oceanie.
translations.el: Στο ραδιόφωνο παίζει ένα ντοκιμαντέρ για τον ωκεανό.
translations.nb: På radioen går en dokumentar om havet.
translations.id: Di radio sedang disiarkan dokumenter tentang samudra.
translations.sv: På radion sänds en dokumentär om havet.
translations.ro: La radio se difuzează un documentar despre ocean.
translations.cs: V rádiu běží dokument o oceánu.
translations.da: I radioen bliver der sendt mia dokumentar om havet.
translations.ja: ラジオで海についてのドキュメンタリーが流れている。
